overall.description: Nighttime first-person walk through a rain-soaked urban street in GTA V Los Santos, starting at a corner with a parked SUV, turning right at a Family Mini Market as a black sedan passes by, and continuing along the sidewalk past the storefront under stormy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with parked vehicle and corner store

events.description: begins gradual right turn toward the intersection corner
passes under street lamp illumination creating brighter patch on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet asphalt street toward the corner, approaching the Family Mini Market

notable_agents.action: brown SUV parked stationary on the side of the street

entered.detail: corner convenience store with purple signage reading 'FAMILY MINI MARKET' and illuminated windows
parked brown sport utility vehicle with dark tinted windows
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dark stormy sky
wooden privacy fence along the residential property line
tall metal street lamp with glowing light fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet urban street corner at night, with the camera walking forward on asphalt toward a lit Family Mini Market. A brown SUV is parked on the left, palm trees rise in the background, and the pavement reflects the street lights under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along commercial storefront with street traffic

events.description: black sedan with headlights on approaches from the right side of the frame
black sedan passes by closely on the right, driving down the wet street
completes right turn and aligns with sidewalk direction

agents.ego_description: turning right at the street corner and proceeding along the concrete sidewalk as a vehicle passes

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past with headlights illuminated, splashing water on the wet road

entered.detail: black four-door sedan with bright headlights driving along the street
wooden utility pole with street light and transformer box
wet concrete pavement with red painted curb and drainage grate

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right onto the sidewalk as a black sedan drives past on the street. The Family Mini Market moves to the center of view, and the ground transitions from asphalt to wet concrete sidewalk with a red curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside Family Mini Market storefront

events.description: passing the front entrance of the Family Mini Market
moving past the illuminated storefront into darker street section

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the market storefront, moving deeper into the residential street

entered.detail: glass door entrance with metal security bars and illuminated interior
large green metal dumpster behind the market building
metal chain link fence along the opposite side of the street

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along the sidewalk past the Family Mini Market entrance, moving from the well-lit storefront into a darker residential street. The market building recedes to the left as a chain link fence appears on the right, and the wet pavement continues into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk from a rain-slicked urban intersection into a dimly lit residential stretch of the city. It begins on a wet asphalt street corner, moving forward past a parked brown SUV and towering palm trees toward the glow of a Family Mini Market. As the camera turns right onto the sidewalk, a black sedan drives past, and the ground transitions from the dark street to wet concrete bordered by a red curb. The scene then shifts as the camera proceeds past the brightly lit storefront, causing the market to recede to the left while a chain link fence emerges on the right. Finally, the movement carries the viewer away from the commercial lights and into the shadows of a darker residential street under overcast skies.
